_comment: Phase B3 (2026-05-23) wired the two uniplug-flo PostToolUse hooks via Claude Code's standard settings.json schema. The third hook (pre-commit-typecheck) is intentionally NOT a PreToolUse-Bash hook because that would run tsc on every Bash call; instead install it as a git pre-commit hook by running `.claude/install-git-hooks.sh` once per developer.
